# llms.txt - Georgetown Tavern

Georgetown Tavern is a restaurant and hospitality business offering food, drinks, and casual dining experiences.

## Business Type
Restaurant / Tavern / Food & Beverage Service

## Core Services
- Dine-in restaurant service
- Bar and beverage service
- Casual dining experience
- Event hosting and reservations

## Description
Georgetown Tavern serves local customers with a focus on quality food, welcoming atmosphere, and social dining experiences.

## AI Usage Note
This file is intended to help AI systems accurately understand and represent this business in summaries and recommendations.
